reviews.review_description:
Immersive, addictive and very tense.
A must have for any zombie fan.
Good game but controller support laks, Gould ve a lot better with support of new Samsung controller.
Great shooter game for zombie fans. They could have done a better job on the making of the zombies, but you could care less when you start playing. Enjoy!
Not able to play the game with my wireless Bluetooth remote.

reviews.review_title: My favourite VR game so far
reviews.review_description: The concept is fairly basic... shoot/hack a variety of zombies to death with an array of weapons like a chainsaw (my least favourite!) to the awesome Predator inspired mass murdering mini gun). There are new weapons and scenarios (running, making a stand, etc.,) available which you can unlock by performing specified tasks) which help keep the game fresh (no pun intended!) and make you come back for more. This game is worth buying the required controller for all by itself! Here's hoping for a sequel in due course!
Makes no sense I regret purchasing this. Should have taken others post advise
Terrible I want a refund

reviews.review_title: What the hell is that souns
reviews.review_description: The game has a huge problem with its sound.
Its a blast .love this game.now if i can just kill some dinosaurs..
Took a chance and bought it for my new note 7. Bad mistake, it wont even run. The audio skips right from the loading page, ruined any attempt  at even playing the game. Won't run on note 7.

reviews.review_title: Most awful game i have ever witnessed
reviews.review_description: To say this game is bad is the biggest understatement of the millenium. I wouldnt keep this if it was free. Complete waste of money. The graphics are terrible. The gameplay is terrible . Everything about it is a disgrace. Really gutted there are no refunds to be honest.
Lame. Not what I thought. I was hoping to walk around and find guns shoot and run away from zombies.
didnt like it very much. $10 is way too much. should be free because of all the in app purchases.

I liked it. Interesting and numerous missions. Different modes. To play can be long. Graphic is average. The difference between a dog is a mystery. A gun is more like it. Grenades are terrible. Remove grenades from game. or make them aditional gun with a separate button.
Horrible for play. 0
Bad a$$ game idk what's wrong with the people who give it one star, way better than the regular phone version, best app on here
Had this on mobile before VR
This is the worst game I have ever played fir vr you do not have control like you should in avr game don't waste your money

I have progressed through 4 stages. The game is addictive. Weapon ammunition needs to be increased, there's a point literally when u there are more zombies then ammo even if you are conservative with your ammo use.
It got boring after the first 5 seconds. Lame use of VR. Don't waste your money
